title: Keep on Burning: The Story of Northern Soul
original_title: Keep on Burning: The Story of Northern Soul
overview: Keep on Burning tells the fascinating story of the world's most enduring underground music movement: Northern Soul. Featuring key DJ's, journalists and promoters, including soul radio pioneer Tony Blackburn, Marc Almond and key DJ's, journalists and promoters.
